pattern: Whenever an unconverted character is found, converting the run of three starting exactly there is never worse than starting anywhere else, since it clears as far right as any other choice.
hints: Scan left to right; once you hit a character that still needs converting, decide the single move that helps the most.
A move that starts exactly at the first not-yet-handled character reaches exactly as far right as any other choice that also covers it, so it never hurts to be greedy.
Walk an index i from left to right: if s[i] is unconverted, count one move and jump i by 3 (that move now covers i, i+1, i+2); otherwise just advance i by 1.

edge_inputs.description: single stray character far from any other, forces its own move
two runs separated by a gap smaller than a move width

stress.description: long random X/O string near the constraint maximum
